text: The IDEA engine's UsageInfo machinery needs a live Document the standalone session can't maintain. How should I resolve the multi-declaration path?

options.description: Add a JVM-linkage stub of com.intellij.refactoring.util.MoveRenameUsageInfo (extends the real UsageInfo) whose ctor skips the document-length assertion
After add(), commit the target document so PSI/document agree (this reparses and drops the copyable-usage marks the engine reads, so retargetUsages becomes a no-op).
For multi-declaration, follow IDEA's file-copy path: copy the entire source file, then delete the other top-level declarations from the copy. Robust for multi-decl.
